fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Prefix used for fields emitted by retrieval, such as contexts and scores.
fields.label: Output Prefix
fields.name: output_prefix

fields.description: Input row field containing the retrieval query text.
fields.label: Query Field
fields.name: query_field

fields.description: Optional template used to build the retrieval query from row fields.
fields.label: Query Template
fields.name: query_template

fields.description: Optional regular expression used to extract the retrieval query from query_field.
fields.label: Query Pattern
fields.name: query_pattern

fields.description: Retrieval provider name registered in the RAG provider catalog.
fields.label: Provider
fields.name: provider

fields.description: Provider-specific retrieval configuration passed to the selected provider.
fields.label: Provider
fields.name: provider_config

fields.description: Maximum number of matching documents to return for each query.
fields.label: Top K
fields.name: top_k

fields.description: Minimum relevance score required for a retrieved document.
fields.label: Min Score
fields.name: min_score

fields.description: Behavior when no retrieval results satisfy the score threshold.
fields.label: On No Results
fields.name: on_no_results

fields.description: Formatting style used when combining retrieved contexts into output text.
fields.label: Context Format
fields.name: context_format

fields.description: Separator inserted between retrieved contexts when applicable.
fields.label: Context Separator
fields.name: context_separator

fields.description: Optional maximum character length for the combined context output.
fields.label: Max Context Length
fields.name: max_context_length
